title: CppIndia Newsletter — June 2025
summary: This month: C++26 reflection proposal update, new job listings from think-cell, recap of June's talk on deducing this, and upcoming CppIndiaCon 2025 announcements.

title: CppIndia Newsletter — May 2025
summary: May edition: Meeting C++ 2025 CFP open, community spotlight on Sandesh Chitguppe, new C++ safety proposals roundup, and free book of the month.

title: CppIndia Newsletter — April 2025
summary: April: Ranges deep dive blog post, CppCon 2025 call for submissions open, community Discord hits 1000 members, curated C++20 learning path.

title: CppIndia Newsletter — March 2025
summary: March: Trip report from ACCU 2025, new contributor spotlight, C++23 compiler support matrix updated, community project showcase launch.

title: CppIndia Newsletter — February 2025
summary: February: Valentine's edition for C++ lovers, Clang 19 deep dive, community hall of fame nominations open, upcoming talk on coroutines.

title: CppIndia Newsletter — January 2025
summary: New year edition: 2024 community year in review, 5 years of CppIndia milestone, goals for 2025, and a special retrospective on CppIndiaCon 2024.
